systems.name: Tiny Shelf Classification
systems.description: A lightweight, original shelfmark system for small personal libraries, studios, and community collections. It groups nonfiction and fiction into broad practical areas and supports deeper subject browsing without relying on proprietary or discontinued standards.

categories.label: Religion, Spirituality & Philosophy

children.label: Religion
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about religion within religion, spirituality & philosophy. Use here for religious traditions broadly, and see related classes for esoteric or symbolic societies such as Freemasonry.

children.label: Spiritual Practice
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about spiritual practice within religion, spirituality & philosophy. Use here for dreamwork, contemplative dream practices, and spiritually oriented work with dreams.

children.label: Philosophy
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about philosophy within religion, spirituality & philosophy.

children.label: Myth & Thought
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about myth & thought within religion, spirituality & philosophy. Use here for symbolic or interpretive works about dreams, esoteric traditions, symbolic societies, and systems of meaning rather than devotional or strictly historical treatment.

categories.scopeNote: Use for general works on religion, spirituality & philosophy. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed.

categories.label: History & Society

children.label: History
Ancient & Medieval
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about ancient & medieval within history.

children.label: Modern History
children.scopeNote: Use for modern historical works, including wars, military conflict, veterans, the American Revolution, the Civil War, the Civil Rights Movement, and major transportation history when treated historically rather than technically.

children.label: Local & Regional History
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about local & regional history within history.

children.label: World History
children.scopeNote: Use for broad world-historical treatments, including global wars and international conflict.
Use for general works on history. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed.

children.label: Social Studies
Politics & Government
children.scopeNote: Use for politics and government, including defense policy, statecraft, diplomacy, elections, legislatures, committees, and understanding government proceedings as matters of governance.

children.label: Sociology
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about sociology within social studies.

children.label: Cultural Studies
children.scopeNote: Use for cultural studies topics, including foodways, culinary history, everyday media culture, and comics or graphic storytelling as cultural forms.

children.label: Education & Institutions
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about education & institutions within social studies, including libraries, library governance, digital literacy, maker spaces, memory labs, and civic educational institutions.
Use for general works on social studies. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed.

children.label: Law & Civic Life
Constitutional & Public Law
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about constitutional & public law within law & civic life.

children.label: Justice & Rights
children.scopeNote: Use for justice, rights, civil liberties, civil rights, FOIA, and nonfiction works on crime or criminal cases when the emphasis is legal, social, documentary, or access-to-information related.

children.label: Public Policy
children.scopeNote: Use for public policy, including public health, disability policy, aging policy, systems of care, budgets, audits, and evidence used in civic decision-making when the emphasis is civic or governmental.

children.label: Civic Practice
children.scopeNote: Use for civic practice, including community building, nonprofit work, chambers of commerce, festival organizing, public meetings, and hands-on participation in local institutions.
Use for general works on law & civic life. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed.

children.label: Geography & Place
Cartography
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about cartography within geography & place.

children.label: Regional Studies
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about regional studies within geography & place.

children.label: Urban Studies
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about urban studies within geography & place.

children.label: Rural & Environmental Regions
children.scopeNote: Use for rural and environmental regions, including agriculture, farming landscapes, and homesteading when the emphasis is place, region, or land use.
Use for general works on geography & place. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed.

categories.scopeNote: Use for general works on history & society. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed.

children.scopeNote: Use for journals, letters, diaries, and personal records within personal life stories. Use here for dream journals and dream diaries when the book primarily records what the writer dreamed rather than interpreting dreams.

Use for general works on media arts. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed. Use here as a broad home for audio media, public media exhibits, and experimental media practices.

categories.label: Reference & Practical

children.label: Reference
Encyclopedias & Guides
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about encyclopedias & guides within reference.

children.label: Dictionaries & Glossaries
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about dictionaries & glossaries within reference.

children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about indexes, catalogs, metadata, tagging systems, classification systems, and information organization within reference.

children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about manuals & handbooks within reference.
Use for general works on reference. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed.

children.label: Home & Making
Cooking
children.scopeNote: Use for cooking and food practice, including baking, nutrition, food history, food culture, canning, preserving, and fermentation when the book is chiefly practical or culinary.

children.label: Crafts
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about crafts within home & making.

children.label: Gardening
children.scopeNote: Use for gardening, small-scale agriculture, homesteading, kitchen gardens, orchards, and related practical growing work. Use here when the emphasis is hands-on cultivation rather than regional land use.

children.label: DIY & Repair
children.scopeNote: Use for practical repair and making, including vehicle or machine maintenance, electric vehicles, automotive restoration, and workshop rebuilding when the emphasis is hands-on fixing rather than design history or transport systems.
Use for general works on home & making. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed.

children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about travel writing within travel & place.

Use for general works on travel & place. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed.

children.label: Wellbeing & Daily Life
Health & Wellness
children.scopeNote: Use for health, wellness, medicine, first aid, caregiving, elder care, disability, aging, nursing, public-health guides, and mental health when the emphasis is practical support, personal use, or general medical reference.

children.label: Mindfulness & Reflection
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about mindfulness & reflection within wellbeing & daily life. Use here for reflective practices, self-observation, journaling prompts, and contemplative wellbeing rather than clinical or medical treatment.

children.label: Relationships & Family Life
children.scopeNote: Use for relationships and family life, including family caregiving, care relationships, and home support when the primary emphasis is interpersonal or domestic rather than medical.

children.label: Lifestyle & Habit Building
children.scopeNote: Use for works chiefly about lifestyle & habit building within wellbeing & daily life.
Use for general works on wellbeing & daily life. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed.

categories.scopeNote: Use for general works on reference & practical. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed.

children.label: Pets & Animal Care
children.scopeNote: Use for pets, companion animals, animal care, training, and behavior. Use here for practical pet ownership and care rather than zoological or wildlife study.

categories.scopeNote: Use for general works on games, hobbies & recreation. Class more specific works in the narrower categories below when needed.
